---
title: "Assignment 3: GST & Pricing in the Indian Motorcycle Market (2020-25)"
author: "Vrunda Patil, Vaishnav Nayak, Sin Chan, Chenghuiyu Fan"
date: today
format:
  pdf:
    toc: true
    number-sections: true
    fig-pos: "H"
execute:
  echo: false
  warning: false
  message: false
---

```{r}
#| label: setup
library(tidyverse)
library(knitr)
library(kableExtra)
library(renv)
```

```{r}
bikes <- read_csv("indian_bikes_dataset_1000.csv")
```
